# Empty or Minimal Docs

## What this folder is for

Empty or Minimal is a generated development fixture for the spec-driven docs viewer.

## How to navigate it

- Start with the roadmap and current-state documents.
- Use module, feature, and packet docs to inspect slice-level detail.

## Current planning baseline

Minimal fixture workspace with one feature and one packet under the normal docs contract.

## Update workflow

Generated fixture content is maintained by scripts/generate-dev-fixtures.mjs.
